mapper.select: SELECT pm.id, pm.project_id, pm.user_id, pm.project_role, pm.status, pm.created_at, pm.updated_at, ua.username, ua.display_name FROM project_member pm INNER JOIN user_account ua ON pm.user_id = ua.id AND ua.deleted = 0 WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.deleted = 0 ORDER BY pm.created_at ASC

SELECT pm.id, pm.project_id, pm.user_id, pm.project_role, pm.status, pm.created_at, pm.updated_at, ua.username, ua.display_name FROM project_member pm INNER JOIN user_account ua ON pm.user_id = ua.id AND ua.deleted = 0 WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.user_id = #{userId} AND pm.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_member (project_id, user_id, project_role, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{projectRole}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_member SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{operatorId} WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT project_id FROM project_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED'
